name: BlendContinuity
summary: Used in curve and surface blending and matching functions.

enum_values.name: Position
enum_values.summary: G0: The curves or surfaces touch at the join point (position).

enum_values.name: Tangency
enum_values.summary: G1: The curves or surfaces also share a common tangent direction at the join point (tangent).

enum_values.name: Curvature
enum_values.summary: G2: The curves or surfaces also share a common center of curvature at the join point (curvature).
